ALAB.headline: S&P 500 Rebounds Ahead Of Nvidia's Print, Oil Sinks 5% On Iran Truce Hopes: Stock Market Today
ALAB.description: U.S. stock markets rebounded midday Wednesday as oil prices fell over 5% on hopes of U.S.-Iran de-escalation. The S&P 500 climbed 0.9% to 7,418, with the Russell 2000 outperforming at +2.3%. Semiconductor stocks led gains ahead of Nvidia's earnings, while energy stocks declined. Airlines benefited from lower fuel costs, but energy companies and some earnings reporters faced headwinds.

ALAB.headline: Why Astera Labs Shares Are Up So Much Today
ALAB.description: Astera Labs shares surged 16.5% on Tuesday following CEO Jitendra Mohan's compelling presentation of new AI data center networking solutions at J.P. Morgan's Global Technology Conference. Evercore ISI simultaneously raised its price target from $215 to $297, citing growing demand for the company's products. The stock has rallied 150% since early April and now trades near its September record high.

ALAB.headline: Nasdaq 100 Falls 1% As 30-Year Yields Spike To 19-Year Highs: Stock Market Today
ALAB.description: U.S. stocks declined midday Tuesday as 30-year Treasury yields surged to 19-year highs amid an unresolved U.S.-Iran standoff keeping oil prices elevated. The Nasdaq 100 fell 1%, S&P 500 dropped 0.6%, and Russell 2000 slid 1.3%. Defensive sectors like healthcare and utilities outperformed, while chipmakers and clean energy faced significant losses. Mega-cap tech stocks including Amazon, Tesla, and Alphabet declined, though some semiconductor stocks like Marvell and Astera Labs rallied on analyst

GH.headline: Guardant Health Secures FDA Approval For Expanded Liquid Biopsy Test
GH.description: Guardant Health received FDA approval for its Guardant360 Liquid CDx test, an expanded liquid biopsy panel that is now the largest FDA-approved in its category. The test evaluates a genomic footprint 100 times wider than the previous version, combines genomic and epigenomic insights from a single blood sample, and can deliver results in as little as seven days. The approval transfers seven previously approved companion diagnostic indications from the earlier Guardant360 CDx test. Shares rose 8.8

ARM.headline: Is It Too Late to Buy Cerebras Systems After the Stock Soared Following Its IPO?
ARM.description: Cerebras Systems surged 68% on its IPO debut on May 14, 2026, reaching a $68 billion market cap. The AI chip company makes large wafer-scale processors that compete with GPUs from Nvidia and AMD. While the company has a $20 billion OpenAI commitment and 76% revenue growth, analyst Geoffrey Seiler cautions against chasing the stock due to its sky-high 67x forward price-to-sales valuation and unproven status beyond a niche player.

ARM.headline: Should You Buy ARM Stock Right Now?
ARM.description: ARM Holdings shares are soaring following a major expansion announcement. The stock has experienced a significant run-up, with shares up 2.85% on May 16, 2026. The article discusses whether investors should consider buying ARM stock at current levels amid the ongoing AI infrastructure spending boom.

RAMP.headline: Halper Sadeh LLC is Investigating Whether RAMP, D, SACH, NEE are Obtaining Fair Deals for their Shareholders
RAMP.description: Halper Sadeh LLC, an investor rights law firm, is investigating four major transactions for potential securities law violations and breaches of fiduciary duties. The investigations cover LiveRamp's $38.50 per share sale to Publicis Groupe, Dominion Energy's merger with NextEra Energy, Sachem Capital's merger with Industrial Realty Group, and NextEra Energy's acquisition of Dominion. The firm is seeking increased consideration and additional disclosures on behalf of shareholders.
